2024 Grantees: Stabilization for Families and Individuals 
<< Back
Ensuring basic needs are met through:
  • Alleviating hunger, primarily through larger food distribution networks or rural food banks that are also a hub of additional services
  • Preventing homelessness or quickly stabilizing people who are experiencing homelessness
  • Offering programs that prevent or reduce the effects of domestic violence, sexual assault, trauma, and abuse
